# spotuify docs

Spotuify is a daemon-backed, CLI-first Spotify controller and local music
library runtime for terminal users.

Start here:

- /getting-started/install/
- /getting-started/quick-start/
- /guides/terminal-control/
- /reference/cli/
- /reference/config/
- /reference/ipc/

The generated CLI reference under /reference/cli/ is built from captured
`spotuify --help` snapshots plus source-backed pages for commands that do not
yet have snapshots.
